channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ATULAUTO] Atul Auto: Recommends Final Dividend of ₹3.00 per Share
item.description:
Atul Auto Ltd's board approved standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹3.00 per equity share of ₹5.00 each, subject to shareholder approval. The board meeting was held on May 16, 2026, commencing at 12:01 PM IST and concluding at 12:42 PM IST. Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

  • Atul Auto approved financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • A final dividend of ₹3.00 per share was recommended, pending shareholder approval.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the company's financial results.
  • The board meeting to approve results concluded on May 16, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ATUL AUTO LTD.-$ | Category: Dividend

item.title: [TATVA] Tatva Chintan Re-appoints Cost & Internal Auditors for FY27
item.description:
Tatva Chintan Pharma Chem Ltd's board re-appointed M/s. Zarna Thakar & Associates as Cost Auditor and RSM Astute Consultech Private Limited as Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-27. These appointments, based on the Audit Committee's recommendation, were approved during the board meeting held on May 16, 2026. The board also approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹2 per equity share, subject to shareholder approval.

  • M/s. Zarna Thakar & Associates re-appointed as Cost Auditor for FY27.
  • RSM Astute Consultech Private Limited re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • Final dividend of ₹2 per share recommended for FY26, subject to approval.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 approved by the board.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tatva Chintan Pharma Chem Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [PREMIERPOL] Premier Polyfilm: Arvind Goenka Gifts 0.05% Shares to Nephew
item.description:
Arvind Goenka, a promoter of Premier Polyfilm Ltd, disclosed the gifting of 52,495 equity shares (0.05%) to his nephew, Mayank Goenka, through an off-market transfer on May 14, 2026. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Before the transfer, Arvind Goenka held 52,495 shares, representing 0.05% of the company's equity. Post-transfer, his holding is adjusted to reflect the gifted shares.

  • Arvind Goenka gifted 52,495 Premier Polyfilm shares to Mayank Goenka.
  • The gift represents 0.05% of Premier Polyfilm's total equity.
  • The transfer was executed off-market on May 14, 2026.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI's Takeover Regulations.
  • Premier Polyfilm's equity share capital remains at ₹10,47,42,475 post-transfer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PREMIER POLYFILM LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [LYKISLTD] Lykis Ltd: Amit Mallawat Resigns as Independent Director
item.description:
Mr. Amit Mallawat has resigned from his position as an Independent Director of Lykis Ltd, effective May 15, 2026, citing pre-occupation and other professional commitments. The company has confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation beyond those stated in his resignation letter. This information has been disclosed in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Amit Mallawat resigned as Independent Director of Lykis Ltd effective May 15, 2026.
  • Resignation is due to pre-occupation and other professional commitments.
  • No other material reasons for resignation were cited beyond those mentioned.
  • Company complies with SEBI regulations regarding the disclosure.
  • Amit Mallawat does not hold directorship in any other listed entities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lykis Limited | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BHARATWIRE] Bharat Wire Ropes Appoints Auditors for FY27
item.description:
Bharat Wire Ropes Ltd has appointed M/s. PKF Sridhar & Santhanam LLP as Internal Auditor, M/s. Dilip M. Bathija as Cost Auditor for the financial year 2026-27, and M/s. Borkar & Muzumdar as Statutory Auditors for five years commencing from 2026-27 to 2030-31. These appointments were approved by the Board of Directors based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee at its meeting held on May 16, 2026.

  • PKF Sridhar & Santhanam LLP appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • Dilip M. Bathija appointed as Cost Auditor for FY27.
  • Borkar & Muzumdar appointed as Statutory Auditors for 5 years (FY27-FY31).
  • Appointments approved by the Board on May 16, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bharat Wire Ropes Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [SYTIXSE] Systematix Securities Approves Audited Standalone Results
item.description:
Systematix Securities Ltd's board meeting on May 16, 2026, approved the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the standalone auditors' report with an unmodified opinion and re-appointed M\s Varun Bhomia & Company as Secretarial Auditor for FY 2025-26. The meeting commenced at 2:00 P.M. and concluded at 2:45 P.M.

  • Audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, approved.
  • Standalone auditors' report with unmodified opinion approved.
  • M\s Varun Bhomia & Company re-appointed as Secretarial Auditor for FY 2025-26.
  • Audited standalone financial statements approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SYSTEMATIX SECURITIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ETHOSLTD] Ethos Ltd Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Ethos Limited's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board also appointed Mr. Munish Gupta as an Additional Director (Executive Director), subject to shareholder approval. The auditor's report confirms an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

  • Ethos Ltd approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • Munish Gupta appointed as Additional Executive Director, pending shareholder approval.
  • Auditor's report confirms an unmodified opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ethos Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GMPL] G M Polyplast: Audited Financial Results for March 2026
item.description:
G M Polyplast Ltd announced the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The board meeting held on May 16, 2026, approved the financial results, reappointment of Mr. Dinesh Sharma as director, continuation of internal and secretarial auditors, and appointment of cost auditors for FY 2026-27. The board also considered and adopted the Director's report and approved the date of the Annual General Meeting.

  • Audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, were approved.
  • Mr. Dinesh Sharma reappointed as director, subject to member approval.
  • Internal and Secretarial Auditors' continuation approved for FY 2026-27.
  • M/s. PRO & Associates appointed as Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Board of Director’s report along with its annexures adopted.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: G M Polyplast Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RISHIROOP] Rishiroop Ltd Approves FY26 Audited Results, Recommends ₹1.50 Dividend
item.description:
Rishiroop Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified audit opinion from Jayesh Dadia & Associates LLP. The board recommended a dividend of ₹1.50 per equity share (15%) for FY26, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. Laxmikant Kabra & Co. LLP was re-appointed as Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved with unmodified audit opinion.
  • Dividend of ₹1.50 per share (15%) recommended for FY26.
  • Laxmikant Kabra & Co. LLP re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY27.
  • Financial results and auditor's report available on the company website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rishiroop Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AIFL] Ashapura Intimates: Standalone Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ashapura Intimates Fashion Ltd's board meeting on May 16, 2026, approved and recorded the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. However, the auditor, N.K. Sarraf & Associates, issued a disclaimer of opinion due to several factors, including unavailability of supporting documents, irregularities noted during the CIRP process, non-reconciliation of payables and receivables, non-deposition of statutory dues for prior years, and lack of key financial documents.

  • Audited standalone financial results for FY26 were approved but received a disclaimer of opinion.
  • Auditor cited unavailability of supporting documents and reconciliation issues.
  • Statutory dues for previous years (2017-2025) were not deposited, though FY26 dues are mostly settled.
  • Key financial documents like bank statements were not available for verification.
  • Secretarial audit report and board minutes were not provided to the auditor.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ashapura Intimates Fashion Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
